layout_strategy.sidebar: Fixed, collapsible, w-64 md:w-20 lg:w-64 transition-all duration-300 border-r bg-card

cards.style: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

odontogram.implementation: SVG-based component. Each tooth is an isolated SVG with 5 interactive zones (Occlusal, Mesial, Distal, Buccal, Lingual).

calendar.event_style: rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-semibold truncate border-l-4

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: `npm install lucide-react date-fns recharts react-day-picker`
THEME_SETUP: Overwrite `src/index.css` with the CSS variables provided in `colors.light_mode` and `colors.dark_mode`. Ensure `.dark` class is handled.
LAYOUT: Create a `Layout` component with a Sidebar and Topbar. Use it to wrap authenticated routes.
ODONTOGRAM: Create a `components/Odontogram.js` file. It should accept a `patientId` and `teethData` prop. If data is missing, initialize empty state for 32 teeth.
MOCK_DATA: Create a `utils/mockData.js` file to simulate backend data for Patients, Appointments, and Doctors. Do not fetch from empty APIs.
LANGUAGE: All visible text MUST be in SPANISH.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all inputs have labels or aria-labels. Contrast ratios must be high (Medical grade).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds. Use solid, clean colors.
Shadows should be subtle (`shadow-sm`) to maintain a clean look.
Use generous padding (`p-6` or `p-8`) inside cards.
Border radius should be consistent (`rounded-xl` for cards, `rounded-lg` for buttons).
Interactive elements must have a hover state.
Toast notifications (Sonner) should be used for all success/error actions.
